name_en: Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version [Grey D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Shoulder Strap ❤ Large Size]
name_cn:
Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version [Grey D Embroidery with Leather Patch and Shoulder Strap ❤ Large Size]
Dior Book Tote Shopping Bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It accommodates various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Size: 42×35×18.5cm
